| summary  = Adventure Card Game card: Hound of Tindalos. Villain 5. Outsider. Mythic.
Type: Monster. Check to defeat. Combat 26. Powers: Immune to Mental and Poison. Before you act, succeed at a Wisdom or Perception 13 check or suffer 1d4+1 Combat damage. If the check to defeat does not have the Magic trait, increase the difficulty by 5. If undefeated, bury your discard pile.
